field_group.brief: Audit trail fields for a trade.
field_group.description:
One of five field-groups that compose trading::domain::trade via
rfl::Flatten<T>.  See trade_identity_field_group.json for the
rationale behind the sub-struct decomposition.

This group carries the provenance/audit fields that record who
changed the trade, why, and when.  These mirror the standard
ORE audit columns present on all temporal entities.

fields.name: modified_by
fields.description: Username of the system actor that wrote this record.

fields.name: performed_by
fields.description: Username of the business user on whose behalf the change was made.

fields.name: change_reason_code
fields.description: Structured reason code for the lifecycle event (e.g. NEW, AMEND, CANCEL).

fields.name: change_commentary
fields.description: Free-text commentary describing the reason for the change.

fields.name: recorded_at
fields.description: Wall-clock timestamp at which this version of the trade was persisted.
